profile.name: how-to-train-your-gpt

intro.title: 🧠 How to Train Your GPT
intro.desc: A guide to building a world-class language model from absolute scratch. Taught like you're five. Built like you're an engineer.*.

install_hints: **🔧 Prerequisites:** Python basics (variables, functions, classes, `pip install`). That's it. No calculus, no linear algebra, no PyTorch exp
pip install torch tiktoken datasets numpy matplotlib --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
